mapper.select: SELECT MISSION_ID as missionId, MISSION_TYPE as missionType, MISSION_TITLE as missionTitle, MISSION_DESC as missionDesc, TARGET_COUNT as targetCount, REWARD_CRYSTAL as rewardCrystal, REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, MISSION_ICON as missionIcon, DISPLAY_ORDER as displayOrder, IS_ACTIVE as isActive, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM TBL_DAILY_MISSIONS WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY DISPLAY_ORDER ASC

SELECT MISSION_ID as missionId, MISSION_TYPE as missionType, MISSION_TITLE as missionTitle, MISSION_DESC as missionDesc, TARGET_COUNT as targetCount, REWARD_CRYSTAL as rewardCrystal, REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, MISSION_ICON as missionIcon, DISPLAY_ORDER as displayOrder, IS_ACTIVE as isActive, CREATED_AT as createdAt FROM TBL_DAILY_MISSIONS WHERE MISSION_ID = #{missionId}

SELECT udm.USER_ID as userId, udm.MISSION_ID as missionId, udm.CURRENT_COUNT as currentCount, udm.IS_COMPLETED as isCompleted, udm.IS_CLAIMED as isClaimed, udm.COMPLETED_AT as completedAt, udm.CLAIMED_AT as claimedAt, udm.RESET_DATE as resetDate, dm.MISSION_TYPE as missionType, dm.MISSION_TITLE as missionTitle, dm.MISSION_DESC as missionDesc, dm.TARGET_COUNT as targetCount, dm.REWARD_CRYSTAL as rewardCrystal, dm.REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, dm.MISSION_ICON as missionIcon, dm.DISPLAY_ORDER as displayOrder FROM TBL_USER_DAILY_MISSIONS udm INNER JOIN TBL_DAILY_MISSIONS dm ON udm.MISSION_ID = dm.MISSION_ID WHERE udm.USER_ID = #{userId} AND udm.RESET_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND dm.IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' ORDER BY dm.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC

SELECT udm.USER_ID as userId, udm.MISSION_ID as missionId, udm.CURRENT_COUNT as currentCount, udm.IS_COMPLETED as isCompleted, udm.IS_CLAIMED as isClaimed, udm.COMPLETED_AT as completedAt, udm.CLAIMED_AT as claimedAt, udm.RESET_DATE as resetDate, dm.MISSION_TYPE as missionType, dm.MISSION_TITLE as missionTitle, dm.MISSION_DESC as missionDesc, dm.TARGET_COUNT as targetCount, dm.REWARD_CRYSTAL as rewardCrystal, dm.REWARD_EXP as rewardExp, dm.MISSION_ICON as missionIcon, dm.DISPLAY_ORDER as displayOrder FROM TBL_USER_DAILY_MISSIONS udm INNER JOIN TBL_DAILY_MISSIONS dm ON udm.MISSION_ID = dm.MISSION_ID WHERE udm.USER_ID = #{userId} AND udm.MISSION_ID = #{missionId} AND udm.RESET_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_USER_DAILY_MISSIONS SET IS_COMPLETED = 'Y', COMPLETED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND MISSION_ID = #{missionId} AND RESET_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND IS_COMPLETED = 'N'

UPDATE TBL_USER_DAILY_MISSIONS SET IS_CLAIMED = 'Y', CLAIMED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND MISSION_ID = #{missionId} AND RESET_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND IS_COMPLETED = 'Y' AND IS_CLAIMED = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER_DAILY_MISSIONS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND RESET_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER_DAILY_MISSIONS udm INNER JOIN TBL_DAILY_MISSIONS dm ON udm.MISSION_ID = dm.MISSION_ID WHERE udm.USER_ID = #{userId} AND udm.RESET_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND udm.CURRENT_COUNT >= dm.TARGET_COUNT AND udm.IS_COMPLETED = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_USER_DAILY_MISSIONS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND RESET_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND IS_COMPLETED = 'Y' AND IS_CLAIMED = 'N'
